name: DTapet SPC Article Pipeline - Copilot Improved

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM input1 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM input2

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "html": {{ JSON.stringify($json.content) }},
  "title": {{ JSON.stringify($json.title) }},
  "targetKeyword": {{ JSON.stringify($json.title) }},
  "sourceArticleUrl": {{ JSON.stringify($json.sourceArticleUrl) }},
  "outputFormat": "html",
  "outputWrapping": "article",
  "pageType": "blog",
  "language": "he",
  "direction": "rtl",
  "businessName": {{ JSON.stringify($json.businessName) }},
  "businessDescription": {{ JSON.stringify($json.businessDescription) }},
  "siteUrl": {{ JSON.stringify($json.siteUrl) }},
  "contactUrl": {{ JSON.stringify($json.contactUrl) }},
  "phoneNumber": {{ JSON.stringify($json.phoneNumber) }},
  "authorImageUrl": {{ JSON.stringify($json.authorImageUrl) }},
  "products": {{ JSON.stringify($json.products || []) }},
  "designTokens": {
    "primary": "#2b2e34",
    "accent": "#bc1f1f",
    "text": "#333333",
    "background": "#ffffff",
    "border": "#e5e5e5",
    "fontFamily": "'Assistant', Arial, sans-serif"
  },
  "rules": {
    "inlineCssOnly": true,
    "noStyleBlocks": true,
    "noClasses": true,
    "noH1Tag": true,
    "tocLabelExact": "תוכן עניינים",
    "faqBeforeAuthor": true,
    "authorSectionFinal": true,
    "singleFinalCta": true,
    "noDateLabels": true,
    "noBreadcrumbs": true,
    "noSchemaInArticleBody": true,
    "compressHtmlForWordPress": true,
    "omitFloatingButtonsOnConflict": true
  }
}
